titleStmt.title: SII 7.343: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 343. (A.R. No. 150 of 1901). ON ANOTHER SLAB SET UP IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīgaṇādhipatayē(ṁ) namaḥ . ni¨rvvighnamastu . namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē . trayilōkyanagarā
raṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svastiśrī . jayādbhudaya śakavaruśa 1447 va¨rtamāna tāraṇa
saṁvaccharada cayitra śu 10 ma-lū śrīmaṁmmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa kruṣṇarā
yamahārāyarū vijayanagariya rājadhāniyalu sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ samasta vaṁ¨rnāśramaṁgaḷa
nu pratipālisuttayiha kāladalū Ā kruṣṇarāyamahārāyara nirūpadiṁda lakṣmīnārā
yaṇakaraṇikara kumāra viṭharasavoḍeyarū bārakūrarājyava nāḷuva kāladalū cauḷiyakēriya
kellaṁgeṟeya vināyakadēvara saṁnidhiyalū boṁmiseṭiya baḷiya mudegeḍe Aṁṇiseṭi
yarū sōmōparāgada pu(ṁ)ṇyakāladalū dānadhārāpū¨rvvakavāgi dhāreya neṟada śilāśāsanada kramaveṁ
teṁdara maṭhada gaḍiya vivara rājabīdiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu siṁduragoḷirājabīdiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu yīsaraseṭṭidu
ṭhada gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu dēvara horapavuḷiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu yī gaḍiyiṁdoḷage kaṭṭisida maṭha biṭṭa dha
¨rmmakke dina 1 ke Uṁba brā(ṁ)hmara jana 6 ke biṭṭa bāḷa vivara teṁkahaḍahinalli bāḷagaḍi seṭṭakāra taṁmya
ṇaseṭṭi gaḍi beḷuva gaṇpaseṭṭi gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu hoḷeyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu joradara baḷiyavara gaḍi
toḷaharabaḷiyavara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu toḷaharabaḷiyavara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ tteṁkalū yī gaḍiyi
ṁdoḷage maneṭāU saha bittūbāḷu mu 3 gadde gēṇi Akki mu 15 Ayikōṭayalli Alasebeṭṭu paḍuvamaneya
jannikruṣṇahabārana huṭu sōmanāthadēvara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu naḍava Okkiṁdaṁ baḍagalu ttirumaṇaseṭṭi gaḍi ku
gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu cappalli gaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu yī catussīmeOḷage mū ha 2 mattaṁ mane bāgila
gade ka¨rtara śaṁkharahebārana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu naḍava Okku ka¨rtara manaṭhāviṁdaṁ baḍagalu ka¨rtara geḍiyiṁdaṁ
mūḍalu ka¨rtara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu yī catussīmeyalli bitta bāḷu mu . 0 Ā yeraḍu ṭāvina bāḷu mu 1 .
gade mēle Aruvaramūlādi ga 43 nāruvaṇaseṭige naḍava gēṇi Akki mu 80 . kaṭi ga Aḷupe hebāranu yī bāḷige te
mu 7 yī bāḷige sugikoḷakege huruḷutta ke¨rre nīru maneya hādina ke¨rre nīru kāhu Oṁduhā maneya
na gadege paḍumane hebā¨rra jaṁnada kāhu guṁḍumeya teṁka hoḷeyalli keṟe tōṭada
ḍuvalu hariva tōḍiṁdaṁ baḍagalu Eḍabeṭṭina śaṁkharanārāyaṇadēvara na gaḍi
yiṁdaṁ mūḍalu ka¨rtara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ tteṁkalu yī nālku gaḍiyiṁdoḷage bittu bhūmi
mattaṁ baṁceṭebāḷa gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu hariva tōḍiṁdaṁ baḍagalu
dalū sūrālakāraṁttana gaḍidoḍḍi hoḷahādiyiṁdaṁ
mu 1 . Ayivattu hāna Ubhayaṁ mu 2 gade
mattaṁ kuṁñaṇa kāraṁtana gaḍi The rest of the inscription is lost.
Digital edition of SII 7.343 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
